allow: Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && rm -f setup.py requirements.txt test_server.py && mkdir -p tests)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run pytest tests/test_models.py tests/test_formatters.py tests/test_config.py -v 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check ticktick_mcp/src/models.py ticktick_mcp/src/errors.py ticktick_mcp/src/config.py ticktick_mcp/src/formatters.py 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check --fix ticktick_mcp/src/models.py 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check ticktick_mcp/src/ 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run pytest tests/test_client.py tests/test_token_store.py -v 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check ticktick_mcp/src/tools/ ticktick_mcp/src/server.py ticktick_mcp/src/client.py ticktick_mcp/src/token_store.py ticktick_mcp/cli.py 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check --fix ticktick_mcp/cli.py ticktick_mcp/src/tools/search.py 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check ticktick_mcp/src/ ticktick_mcp/cli.py --ignore E501 2>&1 | grep -v "auth.py" | grep -v "ticktick_client.py")

Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check ticktick_mcp/src/models.py ticktick_mcp/src/errors.py ticktick_mcp/src/config.py ticktick_mcp/src/formatters.py ticktick_mcp/src/client.py ticktick_mcp/src/token_store.py ticktick_mcp/src/server.py ticktick_mcp/src/tools/ ticktick_mcp/cli.py 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run pytest tests/ --cov=ticktick_mcp --cov-report=term-missing 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check ticktick_mcp/src/ ticktick_mcp/cli.py tests/ 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check --fix tests/ 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && uv run ruff check tests/ ticktick_mcp/src/ ticktick_mcp/cli.py --ignore I001 2>&1 | grep -v "auth.py")
Bash(cd ~/Development/ticktick-mcp && TICKTICK_CLIENT_ID=test TICKTICK_CLIENT_SECRET=test uv run -m ticktick_mcp.cli auth 2>&1 | head -20)
